title: natural_features v1: Time-Aligned Feature Zoo for Naturalistic Stimuli
summary: Build natural_features as a general-purpose, extensible feature toolbox and feature zoo for video/audio/speech/text with fMRI-friendly defaults (time alignment, TR rendering, HRF, design matrix export).
problem_statement: Researchers need reproducible, time-aligned multimodal feature extraction for naturalistic stimuli without stitching together brittle one-off pipelines.
goals: Provide canonical, time-aligned feature object types for continuous, event, and track data.
Deliver a discoverable feature zoo with stable naming, metadata contracts, and recipe-driven execution.
Enable fMRI-ready transforms (TR resampling, event rendering, HRF convolution, lagging, design matrix export).
Guarantee reproducibility via deterministic IDs, parameter hashing, lineage metadata, and artifact cataloging.
Keep core install lightweight with optional extras and plugin extensibility.
non_goals: Full managed orchestration platform in v1.
Comprehensive Slurm/HPC feature parity in initial release.
Implementing all possible deep/social/affect models before stable core contracts exist.
target_users: Labs requiring reproducible multimodal feature pipelines
core_principles: Extractors are standalone-importable; workflow engine is optional glue.
Feature zoo is a first-class product surface.
Strict IO contracts and schema validation.
Optional heavy dependencies and plugin-based extension.

functional_requirements.name: Canonical Feature Types
functional_requirements.description: Provide FeatureSeries, EventSeries, TrackSeries as canonical outputs for all extractors.

functional_requirements.name: Stimulus IO and Timebase
functional_requirements.description: Provide video/audio/text/multimodal stimulus objects with deterministic timestamps and stream/chunk iterators.

functional_requirements.name: Feature Zoo Registry
functional_requirements.description: Provide discoverable registry with stable names, tags, requirements, parameter specs, and output specs.

functional_requirements.name: Recipe-Driven Extraction
functional_requirements.description: Support YAML/JSON recipes and presets for selecting extractor bundles and postprocessing.

functional_requirements.name: fMRI Transform Layer
functional_requirements.description: Provide TR resampling, event rendering, HRF convolution, lag expansion, concatenation, standardization.

functional_requirements.name: Artifact Storage and Catalog
functional_requirements.description: Store outputs with metadata and lineage using Zarr/Parquet/NPZ and index in SQLite (DuckDB optional).

functional_requirements.name: Deterministic Reproducibility
functional_requirements.description: Use deterministic extractor IDs and artifact fingerprints from code version, params, model revision, and upstream IDs.

functional_requirements.name: Baseline Extractor Coverage
functional_requirements.description: Ship baseline vision/audio/speech extractors and at least three flagship presets.

functional_requirements.name: Deep Model Families
functional_requirements.description: Provide deep vision and speech SSL extractors with layer selection and pooling/reduction controls behind extras.

functional_requirements.name: Optional Local Workflow Engine
functional_requirements.description: Provide local execution with plan mode, cache hits/invalidations, structured run logging, and retries.

functional_requirements.name: Plugin Extensibility
functional_requirements.description: Allow external extractor plugins via entry points without core code modification.

functional_requirements.name: Transcript Fallback and Alignment Contract
functional_requirements.description: If a stimulus lacks transcript input, the system must generate transcript events from ASR and produce aligned word timestamps (best-effort), with confidence and QC metadata.

functional_requirements.name: Phonological and Articulatory Feature Generation
functional_requirements.description: Provide phonological/articulatory feature spaces derived from ASR/alignment and/or speech SSL representations, including explicit output schemas and time alignment.

non_functional_requirements.name: Determinism
non_functional_requirements.description: Repeated runs with same inputs/config produce identical artifact IDs and same numeric outputs within tolerance.

non_functional_requirements.name: Performance
non_functional_requirements.description: Streaming/chunked processing must prevent unbounded memory growth on long media.

non_functional_requirements.name: Usability
non_functional_requirements.description: CLI and API expose discoverable extractors/presets and clear validation errors.

non_functional_requirements.name: Portability
non_functional_requirements.description: Core features run on CPU-only environments; heavy models remain optional extras.

non_functional_requirements.name: Observability
non_functional_requirements.description: Runs produce machine-readable logs and summary reports for audit/debugging.

milestones.name: Speech and Language
scope: Transcript fallback when transcript input is missing
Phonological/articulatory feature outputs (posteriorgrams and/or mapped articulatory features)

acceptance_criteria.statement: All extractors return only FeatureSeries, EventSeries, or TrackSeries objects and pass schema validation.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Unit tests across all built-in extractors

acceptance_criteria.statement: Video/audio stimulus decoding produces monotonic timestamps in seconds referenced to stimulus start.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Integration tests on fixed test clips; timestamp monotonicity assertions

acceptance_criteria.statement: `nf list` and `nf describe <name>` expose extractor requirements, params, outputs, and tags from registry specs.
A recipe can execute at least one end-to-end preset and resolve explicit output references between extractors.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Integration test using fmri_speech_language preset with ref wiring

acceptance_criteria.statement: fMRI transform layer supports TR resampling, event rendering (impulse/boxcar), HRF convolution (glover or spm), and lag expansion.
Artifacts are written with complete metadata and deterministic IDs; lineage links to upstream artifacts.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Catalog metadata validation tests and deterministic rerun tests

acceptance_criteria.statement: Ship and execute three presets: fmri_movie_baselines, fmri_movie_deep_vision, fmri_speech_language.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Preset execution smoke tests with expected outputs

acceptance_criteria.statement: Deep vision and speech SSL extractors support layer selection and at least one pooling mode with optional dimensionality reduction.
Local runner provides plan output, cache hit/miss reasons, stage status transitions, and run summary JSON.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Runner integration tests with forced cache invalidation scenarios

acceptance_criteria.statement: An external plugin package can register a new extractor via entry points and appear in `nf list` without core changes.

When no transcript is provided, running speech-language preset auto-generates transcript events and aligned word timestamps with confidence + QC fields; when transcript is provided, alignment stage can refine timings without replacing source text by default.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Integration tests for (a) missing transcript fallback and (b) provided transcript refinement path

acceptance_criteria.statement: System emits at least one explicit phonological/articulatory feature output (e.g., phoneme posteriorgrams and/or articulatory distinctive-feature vectors) aligned to shared timebase and renderable to TR space.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Extractor integration tests validating schema, time alignment, and TR rendering compatibility

acceptance_criteria.statement: Processing a 10-minute test video using baseline preset completes without memory growth beyond configured chunk limits.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Performance test with memory telemetry assertions

acceptance_criteria.statement: Core install and baseline CPU-only preset run without requiring GPU-only dependencies.
acceptance_criteria.verification: CI matrix job on CPU-only environment

risks.risk: Dependency drift and incompatible model/tool versions
risks.mitigation: Pin/test known compatible ranges; record model revisions in artifacts

risks.risk: High-dimensional deep features causing storage/memory blowups
risks.mitigation: Chunked Zarr, default pooling/reduction, streaming pipeline
Expose confidence/QC outputs and keep alignment optional
Default to Whisper/faster-whisper + optional WhisperX; keep Gentle as optional legacy plugin only, not default

risks.risk: Feature zoo sprawl and inconsistent naming/contracts
risks.mitigation: Strict namespace conventions, spec validation, CI enforcement

success_metrics.target: >= 95% successful runs in CI smoke suite
>= 80% stage cache-hit rate on unchanged reruns
100% deterministic artifact IDs on repeated fixed-input runs
< 10 minutes for baseline preset on 5-minute clip (CPU reference env)

deliverables: Core package structure and canonical types
Three shipped presets and sample recipes
fMRI transform and design matrix utilities
